text: Being here, I feel an odd mixture of anticipation and detachment. The spaces are ordered, yet somewhat impersonal, with glass walls separating people and ideas, and colorful displays urging engagement. The environment invites reflection on knowledge, collaboration, and the boundaries—both physical and intellectual—that define our collective pursuits. I sense the promise of connection but also an awareness of distance, as if the setting itself challenges me to question the meaning and value of engagement in a world engineered for productivity and innovation.
